description_long: This rifle features a sleek, modern design with a prominent black metal receiver and barrel, paired with a distinctive wooden stock that has large cutouts, likely for weight reduction and ergonomic grip. The stock is a skeletonized thumbhole type, providing both stability and comfort for the shooter. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a matte black finish, and appears to be fitted with an integrally suppressed muzzle device for reduced noise. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard, and is also finished in black. The rifle lacks any visible advanced optics, instead relying on basic iron sights integrated into the receiver and barrel. The overall construction suggests a blend of steel and wood, giving it a robust yet lightweight appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern rifle with a black metal receiver and barrel, skeletonized wooden thumbhole stock, detachable box magazine, and integrally suppressed barrel. The design is sleek and functional, blending wood and metal elements.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized wooden stock, black receiver, and long integrally suppressed barrel.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the open cutouts in the wooden stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine, trigger, and the wooden stock's contours.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the barrel and stock, showing the magazine protruding below the receiver.
